mapper.sql: ID, NAME, CODE, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT
mapper.insert:
SELECT APP_CATEGORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO APP_CATEGORIES ( ID, NAME, CODE, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE APP_CATEGORIES SET NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE = #{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM APP_CATEGORIES ORDER BY NAME ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APP_CATEGORIES WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
